description: Perform a Naval Architecture stability analysis for a box barge in GeoGebra. Model a barge with a beam of 10m and height of 6m (centered horizontally with the keel at y=0), a center of gravity (KG) at y=4.5m, and a draft at y=3m. Simulate a 15-degree counter-clockwise heel by rotating the hull around the center of flotation (0, 3). Determine the new center of buoyancy (B') and the metacenter (M) to measure the metacentric height (GM). Add a text annotation stating whether the ship is 'Stable' or 'Unstable' based on the analysis. Save the project as 'barge_stability.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
